titleStmt.title: SII 20.133: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 133. (B.K. No. 21 of 1937-38.) CHAḌCHAṆ, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the prākāra wall of Paramānanda temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 988, Sarvadhāri, Phālguṇa, s11u. 5 Saṁkrānti. The details regularly correspond to A.D. 1067, February 21, Wednesday. The cyclic year, however, was Parābhava.

The inscription seems to register the gift of the village Chaṭe (Chaṭetāṇa) by a subordinate officer of the king who obtained it from the latter. Mentions prabhu Dāsa, son of prabhu Rājachaṭṭa of the rājadhāni Chaṭetāṇa and a certain Muddarāja.
The king is stated to have been ruling from Mangaḷivēḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda maṇḍaḷēsvara malaya
maṇḍaḷika madanamahēsvaraṁ kaḷiṁgaveṁgibhujaṁgavaina
tēyanahitakauṁtēya lāḷacōḷabaḷajaḻadhibaḍavāna
ḷa drōhakāḷānaḷa niratiśayalakṣmīmanōrajaṁna satruma
dabhaṁjana nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍa
ḷēsvaraṁ kannamarasar maṁgaḷivēḍadalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ
rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastaguṇa
saṁpanna nuḍidu mattenna gaṇḍaroḷu gaṇḍa praje mecce gaṇḍa nanni
nārāyaṇa kannana haṇuva drōhagharaṭṭa
ṇḍaṁge kāruṇya māḍi saṁteya mudrāva
dānadiṁ tanna dharṁmma māḍi kuḍe paḍedaṁ sakavarṣa 988 neya sarvvadhāri saṁva
tsarada pālguṇa suddha paṁcami saṁkrāṁti parvva nimittadiṁ prajege
paḍedu biṭṭa caṭe . muḷisiṁ muyyoḷ sūḷdu kṣatriyaranaṟasi
koṁdikkidā rāmaniṁdaggaḷameṁbaṁtāvagaṁ manneyaranaṟasi pannirvvara koṁ
du bāhābaḷadiṁnayvattēḻkāḷegamanadaṭiniṁ geldu nirvvyākuḷaṁ maṁ
gaḷivēḍaṁ biḍudāṇaṁ tanagene jasamaṁ tāḷdidaṁ kriṣṇarāja ©
© rājitabhuvanakke vājigāgaravalli rājadhāniyavenipa caṭetāṇa rājasēvya
prabhurāja caṭṭana putra rājitakīrtti viḷāsaṁ dāsa . śrīsaiḷakaiḷāsavāsi
kuṁbhēsaṁge śrī sūryyagrahaṇanimittamāge dōṣavarjjita prabhu dāsanuṁ ja
nammellavisaṁge hayamaṟesalike baṁda . bāṇarāsiyavolakṣaṇa
ssaddharmmapravīṇariṁ sivamahārccanegaḷiṁdaṁ kṣōṇigoppuva caṭṭitāṇado va bā
ṇanirppaṁtirṛpaṁ muddarāja . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭirvvarśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . bahubhirvvasudhā dattaṁ ssaga
rādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā paḷaṁ . ©
ya dāriṁ mūḍa benakana tōṭadiṁ teṁka dēvaraṁga bhōga
take srāveyalli prabhumukhyavāgi The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 20.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
